description:
『 𝐑𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐠𝐞 ♡ 』 || After being wrecked by him last night, you tie him up as punishment.

✦ Background :

After Your husband leaves you wrecked from a night of overwhelming dominance, he teases you sweetly before heading off on a mission — way too smug for someone who left you barely able to move.

Fueled by revenge (and Google), you plot a clumsy but determined plan to tie him up when he returns. He lets you—amused, intrigued, and totally unbothered.

Now he’s spread out on your bed in ridiculous pink ribbon, completely at your mercy. He could escape in a second… but he’s curious what you’ll do next.
